creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port was updated to version 0.5.  However, couple of comments on your 
submission, if you don't mind: 

- You completely forgot to update pkg-plist.  Did you test that with 
your diff applied, port deinstalls cleanly?  That it could be packaged? 

- You've bogusly decided to pollute the tree with patches that simply 
add newlines at the end of files.  It could be done way easily with 
simple ${ECHO_CMD} >> or, even better, by removing offending -Werror 
flag (obviously, you did not think of honoring CFLAGS, did you?) 

- Not sure if I understand last patch to `src/common/image.c'; feel free 
to elaborate. 

Thanks.
